title: Verilog frontend: array of packed structures in packed structure

features.name: array of packed struct as struct field
features.description: Code should include a packed structure that contains a field which is an array of another packed structure type
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic some_field; } first_struct_t;
typedef struct packed { first_struct_t [1:0] some_other_field; } second_struct_t;
